dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WOOHOO~ WE'RE ALL DONE FOR TODAY! GREAT JOB, GUYS!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: DID SUHO RECOGNIZE ME?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: NO. NO ONE'S EVER RECOGNIZED ME YET. HE DOESN'T EITHER, RIGHT? NO WAY!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I FEEL LIKE MY HEAD'S ABOUT TO EXPLODE. I NEED FRESH AIR. I'LL GO RETURN THAT COMIC.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: LET'S SEE. THERE! HARLEM DUNK! UGH, OUT OF REACH!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: EXCUSE ME.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: YES?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: SUHO?! WHAT THE HELL?! WHY'D I HAVE TO RUN INTO HIM HERE AGAIN?! DAMN IT!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: CAN YOU MOVE OVER? THERE'S A COMIC I WANT BEHIND YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: AH, SURE, SORRY.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: HUH? SUHO DOESN'T RECOGNIZE ME? SWEET! SERIOUSLY? IS THIS FOR REAL? SWEEEEET! JEEZ, I GOT ALL WORKED UP OVER NOTHING!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: OH, THAT ONE SUCKED.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: I-I MEAN: IT STARTED OFF GOOD, BUT IT GOES DOWNHILL AROUND HALFWAY THROUGH. IF I WERE YOU, I'D READ SOMETHING ELSE.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: UGH! DAMN ME AND MY BIG MOUTH!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: THEN, WHAT WOULD YOU RECOMMEND?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: AH, AH: TH-THIS ONE! HAVE YOU READ THIS? IT'S SATOMI'S DEBUT COMIC. A TOTAL MASTERPIECE! I RECOMMEND IT IF YOU LIKE THRILLERS. THERE ARE 20 VOLUMES IN THE SERIES. IT'S WORTH CHECKING OUT!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: THIS BETTER NOT SUCK.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THAT'LL BE 2,200 WON.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: CAN'T HE AT LEAST SAY 'THANK YOU'? JEEZ, I CAN'T BELIEVE THAT GUY!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE FOLLOWING DAY

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: OH? IT'S SUHO!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: SO, YOU DON'T RECOGNIZE ME, HUH?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: HI, SUHO.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHAT A JERK! FREAKING AM I INVISIBLE?!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: HOLD ON! HEY, SUHO! COME ON, I JUST SAID HI!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: WHAT DO YOU WANT?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WH-WHAT DO YOU MEAN...?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: IT'S ME, JUGYEONG! WE STUDIED JAPANESE TOGETHER LAST WEEK. DON'T YOU REMEMBER?

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: DID WE?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHAT DO YOU MEAN 'DID WE'!?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: ANYWAY, I DIDN'T GET YOUR NUMBER LAST TIME. CAN I HAVE IT, PLEASE?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: THAT'S ONE INTENSE FACE.

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: HERE.

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: NEVER CONTACT ME UNLESS IT'S URGENT.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: HIS PERSONALITY IS EVEN WORSE THAN ALL THE RUMORS!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: UGH, I'M PISSED! UGH, I'M GONNA READ SOMETHING REALLY BLOODY TODAY! TOO BAD I DIDN'T BRING MY SISTER; WE COULD'VE CHECKED OUT THE ADULT SECTION.

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: OH, THERE YOU ARE. HOW ABOUT THIS ONE?

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: WHAT'S WITH THIS GUY!? DOES HE WORK HERE OR SOMETHING?

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: YOU'RE ONE TO TALK. HEY.

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: THAT COMIC BY SATOMI YOU RECOMMENDED... IT WASN'T BAD. I READ THE WHOLE THING IN A DAY.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: OH! I KNOW, RIGHT? HEH, I KNEW IT'D BE RIGHT UP YOUR ALLEY IF YOU LIKE JUNJI'S COMICS. I CAN RECOMMEND A FEW MORE IF YOU WANT. I'M SORT OF AN EXPERT IN THAT FIELD, HAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: THIS ONE, BLAH BLAH... AND THIS ONE...

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: AND OH, MAKE SURE YOU CHECK OUT THAT BLOG I RECOMMENDED. THERE'S A TON OF HORROR STUFF ON IT. WELL, SEE YA!

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: HEY, HOLD ON.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: Suho
dialogue.line: L-L-LISTEN: THANK YOU FOR RECOMMENDING THOSE COMICS.

dialogue.speaker: Jugyeong
dialogue.line: IS THIS EVEN THE SAME GUY FROM SCHOOL?! WHAT THE HELL?!

summary: Jugyeong is anxious about Suho recognizing her without makeup. She runs into him at a comic book store, where he doesn't recognize her, and they discuss comics. The next day, Suho is cold when she tries to get his number, but later approaches her at the comic store to thank her for her recommendations.
